untranslatable_reason: Signal references multiple lookup tables (26.1, 26.2, 26.3, 26.4, 26.6) with specific candlestick identification guidelines, yearly low calculations, candle height thresholds, and performance metrics that cannot be quantified without explicit numerical parameters.
